config.goal: Implement P0 features in order — Tauri fs persistence → withCrossTabSync → SyncState UI

findings.note: TauriFsAdapter extracted from storage-adapter.ts into standalone file. Already wired into use-request-store.ts via storageAdapter singleton.
Cross-tab sync extracted into composable middleware with onMessage, broadcast, listenStorage, cleanup API. Wired into use-request-store.ts replacing inline BroadcastChannel + storage event listener.
useSyncState hook with module-level SyncState tracker, retry handler. SyncStatusBanner component using Alert for error state. Wired into flushSave in use-request-store.ts.

top_changes: create useSyncState hook and SyncStatusBanner component
wire SyncState into use-request-store save mechanism
